message:
feat(core): add circuit breaker manager with stage-level fault isolation (ft-2p9cb.6.2.1)

BreakerState (Closed/Open/HalfOpen), StageBreakerConfig, StageBreakerState,
RecoveryStep, ChoreographyOutcome, BreakerManager with failure threshold,
open-duration cooldown, half-open probe gating, per-stage independence,
snapshot, degradation detection, and reset. 33 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
